channel.title: Utility on Yong-Siang Shih (施詠翔)
channel.description: Recent content in Utility on Yong-Siang Shih (施詠翔)

item.title: Snappycat
item.description: The snappy files produced by Hadoop contain data headers produced by BlockCompressorStream. Each block is prepended with two 32-bit integers stating the size of the decompressed data and size of the compressed data, respectively.h Therefore, snappy library cannot directly decompress it. This command line utility handles the headers and decompresses the data without any dependencies on the Hadoop libraries.

item.title: Anobii2Goodreads
item.description: The utility could Convert exported Anobii CSV files to Goodreads CSV files for import. Automatically create new book entries for missing books at Goodreads. Crawl Anobii to obtain reading progress and insert it into Goodreads records.

item.title: FreeArray Input Method
item.description: An Array30 input method implementation under Linux.
